---
title: "vignette"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{vignette}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(economicIndicators)
```

## Background
This package provides an analysis of crucial indicators such as population, the AMA exchange rate, and GDP per population of a country.

## Highest GDP Per Year
It provides the highest gdp value based on the given year.
### Example
```{r}
highest_gdp_per_year(economicIndicators_data, 1970)
```
The example shows that the United States had the highest Gross Domestic Product (GDP) in 1970 of about 1.07e+12.

## AMA Exchange Rate
The AMA exchange rate function provides the AMA exchange rate of a country in a certian year.
Ex.
```{r}
ama_exchange_rate(economicIndicators_data,'Spain', 1970)
```
This shows that teh AMA Exchange Rate of spain in 1970 has a value of 0.4207085.
